results.title: Liverpool legend Klopp reaches ‘decision’ on next move with ‘deal done’ after ‘turning point’ – report
results.description: According to reports, the 'deal is done' for Liverpool legend Jurgen Klopp's return to management amid interest from the Saudi Pro League.

results.title: What Hegseth’s comments at Shangri-La Dialogue say about US foreign policy
results.description: The US has addressed defence leaders in Singapore, outlining America’s geopolitical goals.

results.title: 'Was going to get worse & worse' - Arne Slot sack decision supported by ex-Man Utd forward as 'toxic vibe' was forming at Anfield
results.description: Teddy Sheringham believes Liverpool were right to part ways with Arne Slot after a disappointing campaign. The former Manchester United striker claimed a "toxic vibe" was developing around Anfield and warned that keeping Slot would have risked wasting another season.

results.title: UEFA Champions League Final Kick-Off Time In Budapest: Fan Experience And Schedule

results.title: Former Sunderland and Hartlepool United defender Ben Clark signs new long-term deal at Gateshead
results.description: Ben Clark has signed a new long-term deal to remain as first-team coach at National League club Gateshead.
